chapter_title.ar: بَابُ فَضْلِ زِيَارَةِ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ الْحُسَيْنِ ( عليه السلام )
chapter_title.en: Chapter 232 – Merits of the Ziyarah of Abu Abdullah Al-Husayn<sup>asws</sup>

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (18/307)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (18/307)
text: زِيَارَةُ قَبْرِ الْحُسَيْنِ ( عليه السلام ) تَعْدِلُ عِشْرِينَ حَجَّةً وَ أَفْضَلُ وَ مِنْ عِشْرِينَ عُمْرَةً وَ حَجَّةً .

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad Bin Isa, from Muhammad Bin Sinan, from Al Husayn Bin Al Mukhtar, from Zayd Al Shahham,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullahasws having said: ‘A Ziyarah of the grave of Al-Husaynasws equates to twenty Hajjs and superior, and from twenty Umrahs and Hajj’.
en.sarwar: 2. A number of our people have narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn ‘Isa from Muhammad ibn Sinan from al-Husayn ibn al- Mukhtar from Zayd al-Shahham who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said that visiting the gravesite of al-Husayn, ‘Alayhi al- Salam, is equal in rewards to twenty Hajjah. It is even more virtuous than ‘Umrah and Hajjah.”
